title: 睇埋英文譯詞，《願榮光歸香港》真係國歌級！！！

replies.msg:
睇返英文譯本，真係似係外國國歌歌詞咁
一睇就知係同普通社運歌唔同，係有一種國歌嘅靈魂係入面
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y7yRDOLCy4Y
《願榮光歸香港 Glory To Hong Kong》

何以 這土地 淚再流
For all of our tears on our land
何以 令眾人 亦憤恨
Do you feel the rage in our cries?
昂首 拒默沉 吶喊聲 響透
Rise up and speak up! Our voice echoes
盼自由 歸於 這裡
Freedom shall shine upon us


何以 這恐懼 抹不走
For all of our fear that lingers
何以 為信念 從沒退後
With faith, we shall never surrender
何解 血在流 但邁進聲 響透
With blood, tears and sweat, we shall stride ahead
建自由 光輝 香港
For this glory, lib-eral land


在 晚星 墜落 徬徨 午夜
When the stars no longer guide our path
迷霧裡 最遠處 吹 來 號 角 聲
In the fog, the horn of conscience summon us
"捍自由 來齊集這裡 來全力抗對
“Persevere! For we are as one, with poise and be brave
勇氣 智慧 也 永不滅"
Courage, wisdom, are long with us.”


黎明來到 要光復 這香港
The dawn has come. Let’s revive our Hong Kong
同行兒女 為正義 時代革命
Revolution of our time! For righteousness!
祈求 民主 與自由 萬世都 不朽
Democracy, n’liberty, wish them long last here
我願 榮光 歸香港
For the glory of Hong Kong

自己寫咗個英文version，唔知大家覺得可唔可以？

Our tears seep through this weeping land,
Our ears hear the raging of men.
We rise and we cry a-front our stand,
Let this land be free again!

Our fears, though they stayed like a wraith,
The years never stopped our rooted faith!
Our chants ring aloud along the bloodied path,
Build this land o’er our wrath!

‘Tis the night stars fall and all seem lost,
Heed the horn, amidst the haze and through the skies!
We gather for freedom and rights, no matter the cost,
Our strength and wisdom never dies!

Our dawn has come, let us write the pages!
For our home, revolution of the ages!
For our men, by our men ere the end of time,
For the rise of Hong Kong’s prime!

quote.msg:
睇返英文譯本，真係似係外國國歌歌詞咁
一睇就知係同普通社運歌唔同，係有一種國歌嘅靈魂係入面
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y7yRDOLCy4Y
《願榮光歸香港 Glory To Hong Kong》

何以 這土地 淚再流
For all of our tears on our land
何以 令眾人 亦憤恨
Do you feel the rage in our cries?
昂首 拒默沉 吶喊聲 響透
Rise up and speak up! Our voice echoes
盼自由 歸於 這裡
Freedom shall shine upon us


何以 這恐懼 抹不走
For all of our fear that lingers
何以 為信念 從沒退後
With faith, we shall never surrender
何解 血在流 但邁進聲 響透
With blood, tears and sweat, we shall stride ahead
建自由 光輝 香港
For this glory, lib-eral land


在 晚星 墜落 徬徨 午夜
When the stars no longer guide our path
迷霧裡 最遠處 吹 來 號 角 聲
In the fog, the horn of conscience summon us
"捍自由 來齊集這裡 來全力抗對
“Persevere! For we are as one, with poise and be brave
勇氣 智慧 也 永不滅"
Courage, wisdom, are long with us.”


黎明來到 要光復 這香港
The dawn has come. Let’s revive our Hong Kong
同行兒女 為正義 時代革命
Revolution of our time! For righteousness!
祈求 民主 與自由 萬世都 不朽
Democracy, n’liberty, wish them long last here
我願 榮光 歸香港
For the glory of Hong Kong
btw, For this glory, liber-al land 似乎有d怪， 因為glory 係noun, liberal 係adjective

glory = noun
liberal + land = noun phrase

問題已解決
依然係parallel structure

Glory to Hong Kong
The thieves left our land in disarray
Imprisoned the brave and cried "Obey!"
Our freedom's endowed, dare they take it away
Revolution's the only way
Against tyranny we shall fight
Hold tight to the truth, and have no fright
Arise! Save our isle from the darkest plight
With blood and sweat we'll find the brilliant light
So-called motherland's had us deceived
And the despots' occupation's unrelieved
We the people will not be tamed, and we shall proclaim
Our name, regain our rightful fame
The dawn is nigh, though the night may seem long
Our age arrives, may the righteous stand strong
With our free hearts and minds, we'll succeed and return
All the glory to Hong Kong

quote.msg:
自己寫咗個英文version，唔知大家覺得可唔可以？

Our tears seep through this weeping land,
Our ears hear the raging of men.
We rise and we cry a-front our stand,
Let this land be free again!

Our fears, though they stayed like a wraith,
The years never stopped our rooted faith!
Our chants ring aloud along the bloodied path,
Build this land o’er our wrath!

‘Tis the night stars fall and all seem lost,
Heed the horn, amidst the haze and through the skies!
We gather for freedom and rights, no matter the cost,
Our strength and wisdom never dies!

Our dawn has come, let us write the pages!
For our home, revolution of the ages!
For our men, by our men ere the end of time,
For the rise of Hong Kong’s prime!

replies.msg: 呢個正！好英式！

英文歌詞有幾句唔太啱音
stress位唔啱
正常嚟講會將stress既字/consonant放係高音
唔stress既放低音或者短d

有d字可譯得好d
例如fog->mist
其實大體好好
係有20%左右要執下
辛苦晒所有手足
